name: Maple Glazed Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings into three sections and discard the wing tips.
2. In a large sealable plastic bag or shallow dish, combine all ingredients except the chicken. Set aside 1 cup of the mixture separately; cover and refrigerate.
3. Place the chicken wings in the marinade, coating them well, and let sit for about 4 hours or overnight.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and discard it.
5. Grill the chicken wings over medium-hot coals for 12-15 minutes.
Alternatively, you can bake the chicken at 375°F (190°C) for about 30 minutes, or use a broiler in a gas oven for about 25 minutes.
